features: Kids party paper bags for DIY & decor: available in vibrant mermaid colors, these bags feature blank surfaces ideal for stickers, stamps, or drawings; suitable for kids' parties, birthdays, and crafts—mix colors for themed celebrations or choose a single color for a coordinated look

Reusable kraft gift bags for sweets & small presents: crafted from thick paper bags material, these gift bags withstand repeated use for weddings, birthdays, or sweet bags; durable enough to protect sweets for party bags and small gifts while being kind to the environment—a thoughtful choice for UK buyers

Matching stickers for secure sealing: each set includes color-coordinated stickers to seal contents safely while adding a decorative touch; great for wedding gift bags, gift bags for presents, or sweet cones at parties – elevate your gifts with a polished finish

Versatile party bags for birthdays, gestivals & takeaways: use as party bags for kids’parties, takeaway boxes for snacks, or gift boxes for small treats; fits toys, crafts, or sweets for party bags – ideal for Christmas, Easter, or any celebration that needs colorful, practical storage

Compact paper gift bags for convenient storage & display: stand upright for easy filling, seal with stickers, or fold flat for space-saving storage; these small gift bags and small paper bags are great for party planning – stack neatly and organize favors, snacks, or crafts in advance
description: Specifications: Material: kraft paper Size: 5.1 x 3.1 x 9.4 inches/13 x 8 x 24 cm Color: sky blue, light purple, pink Package includes: 12 x paper bags Please allow slight differences in size due to manual measurement.
